hero.subtitle: NBHC designs and deploys AI agent teams in your company — connected to your tools, operated by us, GDPR-compliant.

howItWorks.title: A team that works while you sleep.
howItWorks.subtitle: From your problem to agents in production — a three-step process, no jargon, no surprises.
howItWorks.step1Desc: In 30 minutes, we identify exactly which repetitive tasks waste your time and what AI agents can automate.
howItWorks.step2Desc: In 2 to 4 weeks, your agents are operational. Connected to your existing tools (email, ERP, CRM). Tested and validated.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your agents work continuously. We monitor performance and improve the models. You consume the results.

portfolio.title: We've done it.
portfolio.subtitle: Three AI agent teams built and operated by NBHC. Every interface is live in production.
portfolio.vlogyzTagline: AI agent team for automated video editing. French alternative to CapCut.

portfolio.worthifastTagline: AI agent team for accounting automation and FEC audit.

sectors.title: Agents for every trade.
sectors.subtitle: Packaged teams ready to deploy or fully custom agents tailored to your industry.

sectors.customProblem: Your trade not in the list?

services.title: What we can build for you.
services.subtitle: You have a business problem. We have the stack to solve it.
services.s1Desc: Design and deployment of AI agents connected to your internal data — document processing, automatic classification, report generation, sector-specific conversational assistants.
services.s2Desc: Replacement of repetitive manual tasks with automated pipelines — tool synchronization, bulk file processing, on-the-fly content generation, automatic follow-ups.
services.s3Desc: Full-stack design and development of a SaaS dedicated to your sector — Supabase architecture, authentication, Stripe pricing plans, dashboard, multi-user management.
services.s4Desc: Video, audio and document processing pipelines — transcription, automatic summary, key info extraction, subtitle generation, automated editing at scale.
services.aaasDesc: AI agent teams deployed and operated for your company. Complete automation of your business flows — accounting, sales, content, support.

approche.title: A pragmatic process.
approche.subtitle: From diagnostic to production — we keep things simple.
